---
title: "mon premier script quatro"
Author: "Djalilou Salifou"
format: pdf
toc: true
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

Ceci est un **paragraphe** d'introduction pour prendre en main *Quatro*. L'avantage de *Quatro* est de permettre une meilleure ***reproductibilité***, ***réutilisation*** et ***transmission*** du code `R` dans `RStudio`.

![Logo de Openclassrooms](img/openclassroom.png)

J'apprends ce cours sur le [site d'Openclassrooms](https://www.openclassrooms.com/)

Un **exemple** de `Code R` est :

```{r}
a<-2
a*2
```

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
